headline: Altria Faces New Antitrust Classes As Juul Ties Revisit Valuation
summary: A federal court has certified multiple consumer antitrust class actions against Altria Group and Juul Labs related to Juul pod pricing in the e vapor market. The lawsuit alleges the companies conspired to restrain competition and raise prices for Juul pods across broad consumer groups. Class certification increases legal exposure for Altria Group, with many states and consumer populations now included. For investors watching Altria Group (NYSE:MO), this legal development comes as the stock...

headline: How The Altria (MO) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analysts Reframe Risks And Rewards
summary: Altria Group’s updated fair value price target of US$65.50, up from US$63.92, reflects a modest reset in how some analysts are framing the stock. Recent research points to a split view, with higher price targets often tied to moderating cigarette volume trends and tighter controls on illicit trade, while others stay cautious on long term growth challenges. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets and opinions can shape the way you track Altria’s evolving story. Analyst Price...
